justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for "next Friday around 9am" and then accurately understood the follow-up request for availability "around that time on Friday, June 5th."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: When the initial time slot was unavailable, the agent proactively offered a suitable alternative within the same day and time frame, which the user accepted.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the booking process in three turns, accurately checking availability and then confirming the booking without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment, leading to a positive customer experience.
